author: dev-carlos
description: Increase retry attempts and queue consumer concurrency to improve order processing throughput
diff_summary: Increases queue consumer concurrency from 5 to 15 workers, retry attempts from 3 to 8 with exponential backoff (max 30s), and adjusts rate limiter burst capacity from 100 to 500 req/s. Motivation: order processing latency spikes during flash sales. Changes are config-only with no code changes to business logic.
rollback_plan: Revert config changes via feature flag rollback — see runbook/retry-policy-rollback.md
